title: juglans major
intro: Juglans major, also known as the Chinese walnut, is a deciduous tree belonging to the family Juglandaceae, native to China and Korea. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Juglans major include reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as alleviating symptoms of menopause and arthritis. The herbal preparations of Juglans major include extracts, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to make teas, capsules, and topical creams for various health applications.
